title: Alya Bedwars 32x
description: New Alya 32x Fabric. Bedwars Pack By SparkyNox
body:
WARNING : FOR FABRIC USE OPTIBOXES (SKYBOXIFY) MOD AND APPLY MY SETTINGS

Introduction:
This is a Bedwars Fabric resource pack themed after the anime "Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian." 
It’s designed to work alongside other resource packs—simply place it on top of your existing pack. This pack features a White, Pink, and Blue palette with custom images for every container, including the Day & Night Sky For Fabric.

If you’d like to see different color schemes, such as Red & Yellow or others, let me know, and I’ll consider them for future updates! If you find any bugs, report them, and I’ll fix them promptly.

Report Bugs & Suggest me Some Ideas in Instagram
@sparkynox1
